comment.body: I’m sorry, but I don’t subscribe to this way of thinking. Yes, it’s true that we need to be critical, but she doesn’t have a crystal ball to predict the future even if it seems (she has a 99% hit rate👸🏼)and things change faster than we think. Sure, we have high expectations , but as far as I’m concerned, I don’t like to be critical of her analyses; instead, I always take a step back because if there’s someone here who doesn’t understand due to a lack of knowledge, it’s us. You’ll see that it will be explained this too!
